request_payload.exposure_text: As someone who values safety and stability, it's crucial we acknowledge that recent events have shown our domestic security agencies need stronger tools to protect us. With numerous threats evolving daily, we can't afford to tie their hands with outdated restrictions. Look at how quickly they neutralized the Ohio plot last year - imagine if they'd had even better coordination? We owe it to our communities to let professionals do their jobs effectively. #NationalSecurityFirst #SafetyOverBureaucracy
